businesses. connected

businesses. connected Powering growth in a digital world No matter the size of your business, our technology can help you progress and thrive. With our expertise in connectivity, our leading IoT platform and our global scale, we're taking customers to bold new heights, unlocking transformative value. 215M+ IoT connections 215M+ IoT connections ## H2: Perky Blenders: Brewing digital transformation ## H2: Transforming businesses ## H2: Secure, reliable connectivity with Mobile Private Networks Learn more Connecting businesses
continents. connected

We bring countries closer We believe global connectivity powers progress. Our world-leading subsea cables and satellite technology bring people and businesses closer than ever, fuelling opportunities and bridging  digital divides. EXPLORE CONNECTING CONTINENTS EXPLORE CONNECTING CONTINENTS 100 countries connected through undersea cables
continents. connected

continents. connected Deep connections Subsea cable systems are an invisible engine driving digital economies. We have over of them joining 100 countries, and we’ll add more as needed  to support ever-growing demand. ## H2: What are subsea cables? Expanding our reach From the remotest places to mid-ocean vessels, our satellite solutions are filling previously unreachable connectivity gaps. ## H2: What are space-based communications? Connecting continents
futures. connected

Unlimited possibilities await Invention shapes progress and resilience. By exploring revolutionary tools like AI and quantum computing, we're redefining what's possible and building sustainable growth for years to come. EXPLORE CONNECTING FUTURES EXPLORE CONNECTING FUTURES Unlimited Future possibilities
futures. connected

futures. connected Innovation for a connected future Technology plus imagination equals extraordinary results. From training heart surgeons with augmented reality to IoT tools that deliver the finest Wimbledon strawberries, our potential to innovate is endless. View the latest results We maintained good service revenue momentum in the third quarter across both Europe and Africa. Looking ahead, we are on track to deliver at the upper end of our guidance range for both profit and cash flow. Margherita Della Valle, CEO Vodafone Group

We believe connectivity is a force for good. It’s an essential part of our lives. If we use technology for the things that really matter, it can improve our lives and the world around us. Sustainable business ## H2: CAREERS
Together we can
What if we could make technology a force for good? With Vodafone, you can. Here you can create a better future: for yourself, our customers and the communities we serve. Careers Back to top
